results.title: Erling Haaland Home-Returning Airport Look Is All Charts Luxury; Carries Swanky Dolce & Gabbana Sicily Tote & NYC Racoon Souvenir Worth ₹72K
results.description: Norwegian football sensation Erling Haaland made a stylish return home after the FIFA World Cup, landing in Oslo on Monday, July 13, with an airport look that perfectly blended effortless fashion & luxury accessories. While fans were quick to admire his relaxed travel style, it was the unusual souvenir tucked under his arm that became the biggest talking point online.
